classes.reasoning: The document explicitly self-identifies as 'SUMMARY OF PRODUCT CHARACTERISTICS' in the title and repeatedly uses the standard SmPC heading 'BRC471-SMPC-DRAFT-v0.3'. Contains all canonical SmPC sections (1. Name of Medicinal Product, 2. Qualitative/Quantitative Composition, 3. Pharmaceutical Form, 4. Clinical Particulars, 5. Pharmacological Properties, etc.) per EU regulatory format.

intervention: Lumitanib (BRC-471), 50 mg and 100 mg film-coated tablets
indication: Locally advanced or metastatic EGFR-mutant NSCLC (exon 19 deletions or exon 21 L858R) with disease progression on or after third-generation EGFR TKI therapy
summary: This is a draft Summary of Product Characteristics (SmPC) for Lumitanib (BRC-471), a dual EGFR/HER2 tyrosine kinase inhibitor in 50 mg and 100 mg film-coated tablet formulations. The document describes the approved therapeutic indications, posology, warnings, adverse events, pharmacodynamic and pharmacokinetic properties, and pharmaceutical particulars for regulatory submission to the European Medicines Agency. It is clearly marked as pre-submission draft v0.3 dated 15 January 2024 and is not yet approved for clinical use.
references_to: Phase II study BIORCE-ONC-2023-001, data cut Sep 2023, n=55
